name: Halvar Mono
classification_notes: The name and foundry context suggest a monospaced variant of the Halvar grotesque family from type.today, placing it firmly in the monospaced sans-serif category.
summary: A monospaced companion to the Halvar grotesque family, designed for technical and coding contexts.
description: Halvar Mono extends the Halvar grotesque lineage into a fixed-width format suited to code editors, terminals and technical documentation. As a type.today release, it likely carries Cyrillic support alongside Latin, reflecting the foundry's consistent multilingual focus. The monospaced design retains the neutral, functional character associated with the Halvar family.

name: Fluxtype Caption Petite
classification_notes: The name 'Caption Petite' strongly implies an optical size variant optimised for small text, suggesting a serif designed for maximum legibility at caption or footnote sizes.
summary: A caption-scale optical size from the Fluxtype family, tuned for legibility at small print sizes.
description: Fluxtype Caption Petite is an optical size cut within the Fluxtype family, designed for use at caption and footnote scales where standard text faces lose definition. Caption cuts typically feature open apertures, increased x-height and looser spacing to compensate for optical compression at small sizes. Page content was unavailable at time of cataloguing; details may be incomplete.
